{{Infobox character
| name = Worm Lord
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|No one captured by the [[Worm Lord]] returns with their sanity intact.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Worm Lord]] is a being that someone might feed themselves to.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Worm Lord]] is a potential entity that the [[Mistress of the Mists]] might be dealing with.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
